name: ai-pr-review-assistant-root
description: Root runner for AI PR Review Assistant

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix "Pr - review Backend" && npm install --prefix pr-review-frontend && npm install --prefix pr-review-worker
scripts.start: npx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n "backend,frontend,worker" -c "blue.bold,green.bold,magenta.bold" "npm run dev --prefix \"Pr - review Backend\"" "npm run dev --prefix pr-review-frontend" "npm start --prefix pr-review-worker"
